data.title: Rithm Capital Corp. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York, Rithm Capital Corp. (NYSE: RITM) released its first quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026. Despite market challenges, the company saw positive Q1 performance. Newrez achieved a 19% annualized operating ROE, while Genesis experienced an 80% year-over-year increase in originations. Additionally, Rithm's asset management platform expanded to around $60 billion in assets under management (AUM). Michael Nierenberg, the CEO of Rithm Capital, commented on the strong results.

data.title: Jack Dorsey's company reveals holding $2.2 billion in Bitcoin, with $1.5 billion for customers and $692 million for treasury.
data.description: According to a recent third-party audited disclosure, a fintech company has revealed that they hold $1.5 billion worth of customer Bitcoin and $692 million in corporate treasury holdings.

data.title: Pentair Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Pentair plc, a global water solutions leader, reported a 3% increase in sales for the first quarter of 2026, totaling $1,037 million. Excluding external factors like currency rates, acquisitions, and divestitures, core sales grew by 1% during the same period. Earnings per diluted share from continuing operations ("EPS") for Q1 2026 stood at $0.98.

data.title: Melco Announces Earnings Release Date
data.description: Melco Resorts & Entertainment Limited (Nasdaq: MLCO) has disclosed that it is set to unveil its unaudited financial outcomes for Q1 of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026. This will be accompanied by a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (or 8:30 p.m. Singapore Time) on the same day. Melco Resorts & Entertainment Limited is a prominent figure in the development, ownership, and operation of integrated resort facilities across Asia and Europe.

data.title: Avery Dennison Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Avery Dennison Corporation, a prominent global materials science and digital identification solutions company, shared its preliminary, unaudited results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, listed as NYSE: AVY, reported robust performance during this period. Non-GAAP financial figures mentioned can be found reconciled with GAAP in the attached financial schedules. The comparisons made are typically against the corresponding period in the previous year. Overall, the company is pleased with the strong results achieved in the first quarter.

data.title: Data Center Direct-to-chip Cooling Market worth $17.31 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on April 28, 2026, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets that the Data Center Direct-to-chip Cooling Market is experiencing significant growth. This market includes different types like Single Phase and Two Phase cooling, with various coolant options such as Water-Glycol-based Coolants, Dielectric Fluids, and Refrigerants. End users benefiting from this market are Hyperscale Data Centers, Colocation facilities, and Enterprise Data Centers. The industry forecasts suggest a rise in demand for direct-to-chip cooling solutions, with market experts predicting substantial increases in revenue and adoption rates.

data.title: GM Financial Reports First Quarter 2026 Operating Results
data.description: GM Financial, headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas, reported a net income of $514 million for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, up from $460 million in the previous quarter (ending December 31, 2025), and slightly higher than the $499 million earned in the same quarter of 2025. Retail loan originations totaled $8.3 billion in the first quarter of 2026, a slight decrease from $8.4 billion in the last quarter of 2025, and a notable decline from $9.6 billion in the first quarter of 2025.

A team lead at Amkor Technology Korea’s R&D center stated that glass substrates are expected to be commercialized within the next three years. * Amkor has close ties with Intel, including licensing EMIB-T. $AMKR

data.title: Hep B Free and Coalition for Global Hepatitis Elimination (CGHE) Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate and Scale Hepatitis B Elimination
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in San Francisco, an organization known as Hep B Free and the Coalition for Global Hepatitis Elimination (CGHE), which operates under The Task Force for Global Health, have entered into a strategic alliance. The partnership aims to expand the successful "Hep B Free Model" of community-based advocacy for hepatitis B on a larger scale. This collaboration is significant as it will increase the reach and impact of efforts to eliminate hepatitis B globally.

data.title: SRAD Investor Alert: Sportradar Group Investigated for Securities Fraud Amid Allegations of Illegal Activities
data.description: The law firm BFA Law is currently conducting an investigation into potential securities fraud by Sportradar Group AG. It is being looked into whether Sportradar played a role in supporting illegal gambling activities and generated a significant portion of its income from these illicit practices. As a result of these allegations, Sportradar's stock plummeted by 22%. The inquiry was initiated in New York on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Changelly & Tonkeeper unite for cross-chain deposits to TON on 13 networks, enhancing in-wallet process.
data.description: Changelly, a popular cryptocurrency exchange platform, has collaborated with Tonkeeper to streamline the process of making cross-chain deposits into TON. This partnership aims to provide users with a hassle-free experience within their wallets when conducting transactions across different blockchain networks. By working together, Changelly and Tonkeeper are enabling users to effortlessly transfer their assets between various chains, enhancing convenience and accessibility in the crypto ecosystem. This development signifies a significant step towards achieving greater interoperability in the decentralized finance space.

data.title: Core Scientific transitions to AI by converting 300MW mining capacity site in Pecos, Texas into high-density colocation hub.
data.description: Core Scientific is transforming its location in Pecos, Texas into a high-density artificial intelligence colocation center by reallocating 300 megawatts of mining capability.

data.title: BTC showing bullish bias as it tests $76,500 support. Long-to-short delta favors bulls if reclaiming range highs.
data.description: Bitcoin retraced to test the $76,500 level for support. The long-to-short delta suggests that bulls hold a notable edge if the cryptocurrency can reclaim the range highs.

data.title: Herc Holdings Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Affirms 2026 Full Year Guidance
data.description: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) announced its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The Company highlighted the completion of the H&E acquisition, which is considered the largest in the industry's history. This acquisition has brought forth numerous strategic advantages, such as a 25% increase in specialty locations and the expansion of a robust sales network. The successful integration of this acquisition marks a significant achievement for Herc Rentals in the first quarter of 2026.

The CEO of LPKF Korea stated that the company has supplied commercial equipment to a customer for directly forming 3D optical waveguides — “Direct Light” — on glass substrates for CPO applications.

data.title: Inspire Investing Announces Lower Expense Ratios on 5 Faith-Based ETFs
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, on April 28, 2026, Inspire Investing announced expense ratio cuts on five of its exchange traded funds. The reductions vary from 2.7% to 7.6%, resulting in an average decrease of 5.3%. This fee reduction comes from the leading provider of Christian ETFs, marking a significant cost-saving measure for investors.

data.title: GM releases 2026 first-quarter results, declares quarterly dividend
data.description: On April 28, 2026, General Motors disclosed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with a revenue of $43.6 billion, net income attributable to stockholders amounting to $2.6 billion, and EBIT-adjusted reaching $4.3 billion. As a result, the company is revising its full-year 2026 EBIT adjusted guidance upwards.

data.title: GoldMining Announces Updated PEA Highlighting $1.0 Billion After-Tax NPV and 32% IRR at La Mina Project, Colombia
data.description: In a recent announcement, GoldMining Inc. (TSX: GOLD) (NYSE American: GLDG) revealed the findings of a revised preliminary economic assessment ("PEA") concerning the La Mina Project. This project, situated in Vancouver, BC, showcases promising outcomes for the company. The details of the PEA offer insights into the financial prospects of the La Mina Project, presenting a comprehensive overview of the projected economic viability. This development marks a significant milestone for GoldMining Inc. and underscores the potential opportunities associated with the Project.
